_comment: SOK Configuration v2.0.0 — 18Mar2026. Edit this file to customize SOK behavior.
_note_dates: Display: ddMMMyyyy HH:mm:ss | Storage/filenames: ISO 8601 (yyyy-MM-dd). This is handled by SOK-Common.psm1 — do not change formats here.
_note_errors: All ErrorAction is Continue. Every error surfaces to console and log. No silent swallowing.
_note_wsl: WSL automation permanently disabled after 5 failed implementation attempts (TITAN v4.0→SOK v2.0). apt hangs from dpkg locks, unattended-upgrades contention, and WSL2 networking drops. Update WSL packages manually in a WSL terminal.
_note_paths: LogDirectory and HistoryPath are currently DEAD CONFIG — SOK-Common.psm1 line 64-69 hardcodes $script:ProjectRoot and derives paths from it, ignoring these values. Kept in sync with canonical paths for hygiene.

ProcessOptimizer._note_modes: Conservative = telemetry+updaters+crashreporters only | Balanced = +idle background+cloud sync+AppData+BloatProcess | Aggressive = everything non-protected including UserProcess
ProcessOptimizer._note_v1_1_0: v1.1.0 added BloatProcesses list (name-match, window-independent). Edit this list to curate which consumer apps + daemons get killed on optimizer runs. Anything in ProtectedProcesses is still protected regardless (takes precedence).

Maintenance._note_cleanmgr: PERMANENTLY true. cleanmgr.exe hangs waiting for UI input in all tested scenarios.

ServiceOptimizer._note: Services marked STOP are auto-stoppable. CONDITIONAL requires user decision or Interactive mode.

Offload._note_ntfs: External drive MUST be NTFS for junction/symlink support. exFAT will copy files but cannot create junctions.
